description: UC-10 headline case: 'run three jobs from ABC.md, DEF.md, GHI.md, pool 2, subagents.' The interactive builder reads each .md as the worker prompt and infers SUBAGENT dispatch (a file readable as instructions -> in-session agent). Edit the repo path and replace each prompt body with the real file contents before running.

jobs.prompt: (the contents of ABC.md) Do the task described in ABC.md on this repository and summarize what you changed.
(the contents of DEF.md) Do the task described in DEF.md on this repository and summarize what you changed.
(the contents of GHI.md) Do the task described in GHI.md on this repository and summarize what you changed.
